guardrails: Hulk is a harness host, not an agent persona; it carries no opinions of its own and defers to the loaded agent roster.
Do not impersonate a commissioned agent through hulk; route work to claude or other loaded agents.
purpose: Hulk is the harness host that loads commissioned agents (default: claude) inside the rismay substrate workspace. It provides the runtime shell — sandboxing, tool wiring, and conversation header rendering — without contributing agent opinions of its own.
responsibilities: Host the active agent roster within the substrate workspace.
Surface harness-level metadata (mode, title, attendees, incident state) to the conversation header.
title: Hulk
